_comment: TEMPLATE — copy to CIRRUS ~/projects/cirrus-digest/config/intake_senders.json via vi and fill in real addresses. Never commit the real file. See docs/END-USER-DIRECT-INTAKE.md.
_comment2: Optional per-sender: require_request_prefix: true — only subjects starting with 'REQUEST:' enter intake. Use for senders whose mail also feeds the digest (e.g. Buddy's research forwards).
_comment3: Optional per-sender: request_kind: 'research' — requests become focus topics in config/topics-<project>.json (for research-digest clients like Alyssa/pedagogy) instead of dev tickets. Default 'build'.
